query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Based on a search of the FERC eLibrary (AdvancedSearch API, affiliation = "Google", June 1–December 31, 2024), Google entities submitted **5 filings** across the following docket numbers:

| Filing | Date Filed | Docket Number(s) |
|---|---|---|
| Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC | 12/10/2024 | **AD24-11-000** |
| Triennial Market Power Analysis (SPP Region) — Google Energy LLC | 12/27/2024 | **ER10-2835-012** |
| (Doc-less) Motion to Intervene — Google LLC | 09/19/2024 | **ER24-2891-000, ER24-2888-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000, ER24-2889-000** |
| Supplement to Notice of Change in Status — Google Energy LLC | 11/05/2024 | **ER10-2835-011** |
| Triennial Market Power Analysis (Central Region) — Google Energy LLC | 06/28/2024 | **ER10-468-005** |

**Summary of unique docket numbers:**
- AD24-11-000
- ER10-2835-011 and ER10-2835-012 (two sub-filings under the ER10-2835 market-based rate docket)
- ER10-468-005
- ER24-2891-000, ER24-2888-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000, ER24-2889-000 (the motion to intervene spanning six related dockets)

**Notes / caveats:**
- These filings were made under two related corporate names: **Google LLC** and **Google Energy LLC** (with Perkins Coie LLP acting as agent on several). I included both since they are the same corporate family; if you need only filings made directly under the "Google LLC" name, those would be the AD24-11-000 comments and the ER24-28xx motion to intervene.
- The two ER10-2835 entries and the ER10-468 entry are Google Energy LLC's routine triennial market power analyses / change-in-status notices for its market-based rate authority.

*Source: FERC eLibrary AdvancedSearch API (search executed via the FERC docket tool, results CSV saved to /work/ferc_search_20260613_225502.csv).*
